series_metadata.series_description: Documentation responding to customer communications, whether positive or negative, which outlines follow-up on the part of the Commission as well as the contractor.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 months. If referencing a particular contractor, retain for a months after contract expiration ; Electronic: Retain for 6 months . If referencing a particular contractor, retain for 6 months after contract expiration, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
